summary: v1.5.0 Testing Complete - All 15 backend tests passed, Frontend verification complete. New features: Multi-broker support (6 brokers) and Live Option Chain with Greeks (9 instruments) fully functional.
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.5.0 features fully tested. Multi-broker support and Option Chain with Greeks working. Option chain data is SIMULATED using Black-Scholes model (not live broker data). Broker APIs require real credentials to test actual trading.

broker_management.description: All 6 brokers supported with switching functionality

api_verified.GET /api/brokers/list: 200 OK - returns 6 brokers (upstox, zerodha, angelone, fivepaisa, paytm_money, iifl)
api_verified.POST /api/brokers/set-active: 200 OK - broker switching works for all 6 brokers
api_verified.POST /api/brokers/set-active (invalid): 200 OK - returns error for unknown broker
api_verified.GET /api/brokers/active: 200 OK - returns active broker info with 'active: true'

frontend_verified.broker_tab: All 6 broker cards visible in Settings > Broker tab
frontend_verified.broker_selection: Clicking broker card updates active broker with 'Active' badge
frontend_verified.broker_names: Upstox, Zerodha (Kite Connect), Angel One (SmartAPI), 5paisa, Paytm Money, IIFL Securities

frontend_verified.dropdown_groups: Instrument dropdown shows 'INDEX OPTIONS' and 'MCX COMMODITIES' groups

option_chain_data.description: Option chain with Greeks for all 9 instruments

api_verified.GET /api/option-chain/NIFTY: 200 OK - returns chain with greeks, summary, PCR, max_pain
api_verified.GET /api/option-chain/BANKNIFTY: 200 OK - different lot_size and strike_step from NIFTY
api_verified.GET /api/option-chain/GOLD: 200 OK - MCX commodity with exchange=MCX, type=commodity
api_verified.GET /api/option-chain/INVALID: 200 OK - returns error for unknown instrument

frontend_verified.summary_cards: Spot Price, ATM Strike, PCR, Max Pain, ATM IV all displayed
frontend_verified.greeks_columns: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega columns visible
frontend_verified.other_columns: OI, Vol, IV, LTP, Chg% columns visible

api_verified.POST /api/option-chain/greeks: 200 OK - returns delta, gamma, theta, vega, rho, price

option_chain_tab.summary_cards: ✓ All 5 cards visible (Spot, ATM, PCR, Max Pain, ATM IV)
option_chain_tab.option_table: ✓ Visible with CE/PE columns, Greeks, OI, Vol, IV

mocked_apis_note: Option chain data is SIMULATED using Black-Scholes model when broker is not connected. Real broker API calls require actual credentials.
console_errors: 404 errors for static resources (favicon, manifest) - not affecting functionality
